_comment: RECOMMENDED PACKAGE.JSON — for the oriz-family scaffold. The existing package.json (name='img-oriz-in') already has substantial deps for the image-tools app (browser-image-compression, fabric, react-image-crop, @imgly/background-removal, face-api.js, etc.). Merge the following ADDITIONS into the existing package.json — do NOT overwrite. Add @chirag127/oriz-ui, firebase, lucide-react, @astrojs/sitemap (if missing), and pin engine + packageManager. Then drop @astrojs/cloudflare + @astrojs/partytown if you want a pure static deploy via wrangler.
name: @chirag127/oriz-image-tools
